summary: The diff implements the vast majority of all 6 requirements. REQ-1 through REQ-6 are all substantially addressed. Minor gaps exist around the dashboard status filter tabs being hidden in compact mode, and some hallucinated extras beyond the spec. Overall coverage is very high.

missing_requirements.requirement: Dashboard page must show status filter tabs (New / Called / Won) with live table filtering directly on the /admin/dashboard page
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminDashboard renders LeadsTable with compact=true, which hides the toolbar including filter tabs and Export CSV button per the LeadsTable code. Filter tabs and Export CSV are only accessible from AdminLeadsPage, not the /admin/dashboard view.

hallucinated_features.description: Free-text search input field in the leads table toolbar
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies status filter tabs (New/Called/Won) and Export CSV. The diff adds a free-text search box in the LeadsTable toolbar that was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Toast notification system in Lead Assignment page for assignment confirmations
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec only requests an agent assignment dropdown per lead row. The diff adds a toast notification system showing confirmation messages when a lead is assigned, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: New Policy action button on the Policy Management page
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec only asks for a placeholder list view for Policy Management. The diff adds a New Policy button in the header which was not requested.
